title: CHILD AND ADOLESCENT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: LANE COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH CHILD AND ADOLESCENT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides programs for people who present with issues around behavior, anxiety, depression, psychotic thinking, and trauma-related issues. Services include individual, family, and group therapy that focus on strategic and structural family issues and support, trauma-related care, and wraparound services (for high-needs children). 2411 Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Children and adolescents under age 18 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 682-7253 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 682-3608 Main phone/Crisis Line (541) 682-3276 FAX Intake (541) 682-7253 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information if applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Family Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ADULT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - LANE COUNTY-WIDE CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MOBILE CRISIS SERVICES OF LANE COUNTY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LANE COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH
